differential_diagnoses: Septic shock secondary to spontaneous bacterial peritonitis
next_steps: Perform peripheral blood smear for thick and thin malaria parasites
Order comprehensive arbovirus panel (Dengue, Chikungunya, Yellow Fever IgM/PCR)
Send blood and urine for Leptospira PCR and Leptospirosis serology
Obtain formal echocardiography to characterize biventricular dysfunction
Perform diagnostic paracentesis with fluid analysis (cell count, differential, culture)
Order serial cardiac biomarkers (Troponin, NT-proBNP) and lactate levels
Consult Infectious Disease for possible empiric coverage of severe leptospirosis
